purpose: Open the story with a compelling visual and headline that captures attention and sets the narrative frame.
writingRules: Headline must communicate the core tension or question, not just describe the topic
Subheadline adds context the reader needs before scrolling
No clickbait — headline must be deliverable by the story
Maximum 12 words for headline, 25 for subheadline
seoRules: Primary keyword must appear in the headline
Meta description derived from subheadline + first paragraph
OG image must be set to heroImage or generated fallback
